title: ONYXX
description: This is a Vanilla plus modpack for 1.21.4 using Neoforge and includes modifications for graphics, items such as furniture, and ease of life improvements.
body:
A Mod Pack built around graphics and various mods for quality of life and immersion such as Waystones, Journey Map, Towns and Towers, Jade, and more. Also includes optional textures, shaders, and various improvements for visuals, and audio in settings. Players can expect vanilla Minecraft with the added benefits of teleportation, navigation mods using minimaps and waypoints, upgrades to villagers and their towns, ability to create functional kitchens and cooking stations, and some UI improvements like a slot for item deletion in inventory. 

The purpose of this Mod Pack was to create a package for me and my friends to enjoy advanced gameplay mechanics but retain the Vanilla Minecraft feel and look. This pack is subject to change based off the wants of the players and may be expanded in future versions with additional mods.
